message:
fix: lower sidebar collapse/pin icon z-index below modals and popups (#3638)

The sidebar collapse and pin buttons used z-[51] which placed them above
floating popups and modals (z-50). The resize handle also used z-50,
competing with modal overlays. Lowered both to z-[45] so they sit between
the sidebar body (z-40) and all popups/modals (z-50+).

Closes #3636

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
